summary: Schema migration: makes telegram_id nullable for non-Telegram sources via table recreation
side_effects: Recreates channels table with nullable telegram_id
Migrates existing data preserving id and values
Adds unique index only on non-null telegram_ids
notes: Migration 003 handles schema evolution for multi-source support. Uses table recreation pattern since SQLite lacks ALTER COLUMN. Conditional unique index idx_channels_telegram_id ensures Telegram channels remain unique while allowing non-Telegram sources to have null telegram_id.
